---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that is not working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: r1azmh
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened? Include any error messages or order notes if relevant.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment
| Detail | Value |
|---|---|
| Plugin Version | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| WordPress Version | e.g. 6.5 |
| WooCommerce Version | e.g. 8.7 |
| PHP Version | e.g. 8.1 |
| Browser (if admin UI issue) | e.g. Chrome 124 |

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. specific order status, phone number format used, ASPSMS error code from order notes).
